context_text: There was no garret at all, and no cellar—except a small hole dug in the ground, called a cyclone cellar, where the family could go in case one of those great whirlwinds arose, mighty enough to crush any building in its path.

context_text: a cyclone cellar was reached by a trap door in the middle of the floor, from which a ladder led down into the small, dark hole.
